summary: Frontend regression test of AvocatSheet auto-close bug fix. All 8 acceptance criteria from review_request validated against the live preview URL with admin credentials. The Sheet now correctly stays open after every sub-tab save (Adresses, Méga, Inhabilité, Web), correctly stays open after Identification update, switches to edit mode after creation (tab-adr becomes enabled), correctly closes via Annuler, and existing Méga + Inhabilités data are now hydrated from the backend on open.
critical_code_review_comments: AvocatSheet.jsx (~540 lines) is approaching the 700-line guidance; consider splitting per tab (AdressesTab, MegaTab, InhabTab, WebTab) for maintainability.
Web tab 'Annuler' (Adresse editor) shares the label 'Annuler' with the Identification cancel button — fine functionally but worth distinct data-testids for clarity.
saveInhab passes no {close:false} — currently parent defaults close=false so it works, but explicit intent (like saveAdresse/saveMega) would be more robust against future signature changes.

useEffect on `avocat` re-fetches mega/inhab/adresses every time the parent passes a new object reference (e.g., after handleSaved sets editing=updatedAvocat). It works but causes redundant network calls; consider keying on avocat?.id.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test avocat 'TESTSHEET5299 / Sheet' (code A0001) during creation-flow test. Existing 'Tremblay / Marie' (AV001) was used for sub-tab save tests; one address ('123 rue Test'), one inhabilité (2025-01-01 → 2025-12-31), méga sectbar=Civil exp=10, and codeusager=testuser01 were added to it.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug P0 (AvocatSheet auto-close on sub-tab save) is FULLY FIXED and verified. Test results: TEST1 Adresses save→open True; TEST2 Mega save→open True; TEST3 Inhab save→open True; TEST4 Ident update→open True; TEST5 Web save→open True; TEST6 Annuler→closed (False) correct; TEST7 Create→open True and tab-adr.data-disabled=null (enabled); TEST8 reopen mega-sectbar='Civil' experience='10' and inhab rows count=2 (data correctly hydrated from backend GET /avocats/{id}/mega and /inhabilites). Existing seed data may now contain extra TEST adresse/inhab on AV001 — clean up if needed before next regression. Backend testing was explicitly skipped per the request.
rca of the issue: Original bug: every save in sub-tabs called onSaved() which set editing=null in parent, closing the Sheet. Fix verified: (a) AvocatsList.handleSaved now accepts {close, updatedAvocat} and only closes when close=true; (b) saveAdresse/saveMega pass {close:false}; (c) handleSubmit (create+update) passes {updatedAvocat:data} to keep Sheet open and switch to edit mode (tab-adr becomes enabled); (d) useEffect on mount fetches mega + inhabilites + adresses so existing data is no longer overwritten by defaults. All four code paths verified end-to-end on the live preview URL.
